issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete and incorrect. The effect requires: (1) looking at top 3 cards, (2) revealing up to 1 {Dressrosa} type card excluding [Rebecca], (3) adding it to hand, (4) trashing the rest. Current DSL only has SearchDeck with empty filter and no trash logic.
Filter missing required constraints: type must be {Dressrosa}, card name must not be [Rebecca], and action must be limited to 'up to 1' card
Missing secondary action to trash remaining cards from the 3 examined
